# Loop XXI

> Loop XXI is a holding and operating company. We build software, pursue ventures, and grow the balance sheet. Our software is open source wherever possible.

## Pages

- [Home](https://loopxxi.com/): who we are and how we operate

## Code

- [GitHub](https://github.com/Loop-XXI): open-source tools, including [agentready](https://github.com/Loop-XXI/agentready) — audit any website for AI-agent readiness

## Contact

- Email: business@loopxxi.com
